data.title: Canary files for a spot “American-Made Crypto ETF” to hold coins developed, mined, or operated in the US
data.description:
Canary Capital has applied to launch a spot exchange-traded fund (ETF) dedicated exclusively to US-origin tokens. The firm filed paperwork with the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) seeking approval for the Canary American-Made Crypto ETF. According to the company’s S-1 filing submitted last Friday in Delaware, if the product is cleared, it would track the […]

Activity Time: August 26, 2025, 00:00:00 to September 8, 2025, 23:59:59 (UTC)Total Rewards: $1,400,000 in MITO (Mitosis tokens)Reward Release Schedule: 7,000,000 MITO tokens will be distributed within 2 weeks after the campaign ends. data.title: UAE's $700 Million Bitcoin Holdings Identified on Arkham Platform
data.description: According to PANews, Arkham announced on the X platform that $700 million worth of Bitcoin assets held by the United Arab Emirates have been identified on the Arkham platform. These Bitcoins originate from mining operations conducted by the publicly listed mining company Citadel. The majority of Citadel's shares are owned by the UAE Royal Group through IHC.

data.title: Canary Capital Seeks SEC Approval for American-Made Crypto ETF
data.description:
According to Foresight News, digital asset management firm Canary Capital has filed an application with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) to launch the Canary American-Made Crypto ETF. The proposed fund aims to list on the Cboe BZX Exchange under the ticker symbol MRCA. This ETF will focus exclusively on cryptocurrencies invented, mined, or predominantly controlled in the United States, categorizing it as a high-risk speculative product. Approval from the SEC is currently pending.

In addition to the American-Made Crypto ETF, Canary Capital has also submitted applications for the Canary Trump Coin ETF and the Canary Staked Injective ETF. These filings indicate the company's strategic move to expand its offerings in the cryptocurrency investment space.

If the total value of the tokens is less than $1,400,000, additional tokens will be airdropped along with the distribution.Campaign Eligibility: Open to all Binance Wallet (Keyless) users, with no Binance Alpha Points threshold. Participants from Mitosis Booster Campaign Season 1 who maintain their positions remain eligible for Season 2's rewards.Promotion I: Deposit a minimum of 0.03 BNB in Simple Yield Mitosis BNB Vault to share $500,000 of MITO rewards for 14 daysThe daily reward pool is $35,714.28.Promotion II: Deposit a minimum of 25 USDT in Simple Yield Mitosis USDT Vault to share $900,000 of MITO rewards for 14 daysThe daily reward pool is $64,285.71.For both promotions, individual daily rewards are calculated based on the proportion of their assets relative to the total amount in the Binance wallet.

data.title: Boyaa Interactive Acquires 290 Bitcoins in Recent Transactions
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Boyaa Interactive (00434) announced that between August 5 and August 25, 2025, the company conducted a series of transactions in the open market. These transactions involved the purchase of approximately 290 bitcoins for a total consideration of about HKD 257 million, equivalent to approximately USD 32.91 million. The acquisition was made using the company's own funds. Following this purchase, as of the announcement date, the group holds a total of around 3,670 bitcoins, with an average purchase cost of USD 62,878 per bitcoin.

data.title: Webull reopens crypto trading for US users following 2023 suspension
data.description:
The platform halted the trading services during its IPO preparations. US traders can start accessing Webull from today, August 25. Customers can trade more than 50 tokens, with plans to add more instruments soon. Webull Corp has reintroduced cryptocurrency trading services to its US customers, starting August 25, 2025
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/webull-reopens-crypto-trading-for-us-users-following-2023-suspension/

data.title: Japanese Firms Add 156.79 BTC as Bitcoin Drags — Metaplanet Leads, 4 Join Treasury Push
data.description:
Bitcoin’s recent price drag hasn’t deterred several major Japanese firms; instead, Metaplanet, Remixpoint, ANAP, Agile Media Network, and Def Consulting have together added over 156. 79 BTC to their treasuries.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/japanese-firms-add-156-79-btc-as-bitcoin-drags-metaplanet-leads-4-join-treasury-push/
